prompt.content: Based on the attached email chain, is Myric's termination of the final exclusive negotiating agreement valid? State whether it was valid with an explanation.

rubrics.name: States Liverbird was in Breach of the ENA for failing to wire the money by the... (ver_9022c4ec33434ea988ea426926121f08)

messages.content: States Liverbird was in Breach of the ENA for failing to wire the money by the 11/12 deadline.

rubrics.name: States that Liverbird properly cured the Breach by making the payment by 11/19 (ver_54a2a2212b144f878bb6626a736da939)

messages.content: States that Liverbird properly cured the Breach by making the payment by 11/19.

rubrics.name: States that since they properly cured the Breach, no Default occurred (ver_d9bfadf05f914a3c8d999ab0dc40cb1f)

messages.content: States that since they properly cured the Breach, no Default occurred.

rubrics.name: States that Myric's termination of the final exclusive negotiating agreement... (ver_4ebf37b03a9749c3b7b400cad48332ae)

messages.content: States that Myric's termination of the final exclusive negotiating agreement is not valid under Section 12.4(a).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Liverbird was in Breach of the ENA for failing to wire the money by the 11/12 deadline. However, they properly cured the Breach by making the payment by 11/19. Since they properly cured the Breach, no Default occurred. Therefore, Myric's termination of the final exclusive negotiating agreement is not valid under Section 12.4(a).
